intended_use: Libby Echo:Prio is software that is used to process previously acquired DICOM-compliant cardiac ultrasound images, and to make measurements on these images in order to provide automated estimation of
intended_use_full: Libby Echo:Prio is software that is used to process previously acquired DICOM-compliant cardiac ultrasound images, and to make measurements on these images in order to provide automated estimation of several cardiac measurements. The data produced by this software is intended to be used to support qualified cardiologists, sonographers, or other licensed professional healthcare practitioners for clinical decision-making. Libby Echo:Prio is indicated for use in adult patients.
target_condition: Cardiac function assessment in adults requiring ejection fraction estimation and cardiac measurements
ground_truth: For view classification and ED/ES identification: 12-lead ECG; for ejection fraction: annotations by four human expert clinicians
other_metrics: View classification F1 score >96.6%; heartbeat rate estimation slope 0.98 (95% CI) vs 12-lead ECG ground truth; ejection fraction bivariate linear regression slope 0.79 (95% CI 0.52, 0.98) vs four human expert annotations
